mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user_action WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY action_time DESC
SELECT * FROM user_action WHERE action_type = #{actionType} ORDER BY action_time DESC
SELECT * FROM user_action WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND action_type = #{actionType} ORDER BY action_time DESC
SELECT * FROM user_action WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY action_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_action (user_id, action_type, action_target, action_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{actionType}, #{actionTarget}, NOW())

INSERT INTO user_action (user_id, action_type, action_target, action_time) VALUES
(#{action.userId}, #{action.actionType}, #{action.actionTarget}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_action WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT action_type, COUNT(*) as count FROM user_action WHERE user_id = #{userId} GROUP BY action_type
